parameters.query:
-- 오늘 타임라인이 있는 공유회
SELECT iid, i_title_userside, i_full_schedule, i_eventdate, i_alimurl,
  i_submitdate_first, i_submitdate_last, i_open_sent_at,
  CASE
    WHEN i_submitdate_first::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'open'
    WHEN i_eventdate = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'dday'
    WHEN i_eventdate = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 'd1'
    WHEN i_submitdate_first::date < CURRENT_DATE
      AND i_submitdate_last::date >= CURRENT_DATE
      AND i_eventdate > CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 'remind'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS status
FROM item
WHERE i_type = 'sharing'
  AND i_eventdate >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND i_submitdate_first::date <= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY i_eventdate

-- 오늘 타임라인이 있는 공유회
SELECT iid, i_title_userside, i_full_schedule, i_eventdate, i_alimurl,

  CASE
    WHEN i_submitdate_first::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'open'
    WHEN i_eventdate = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'dday'
    WHEN i_eventdate = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 'd1'
    WHEN i_submitdate_first::date < CURRENT_DATE
      AND i_submitdate_last::date >= CURRENT_DATE
      AND i_eventdate > CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 'remind'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS status
FROM item
WHERE i_type = 'sharing'
  AND i_eventdate >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND i_submitdate_first::date <= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY i_eventdate
